item.name: Argos Horn
item.description: Reaching across time and space, the sound of this horn brings Argos bounding to your side.

mount.name: Argos
mount.action: Summon forth Argos, Venat's faithful familiar, to bear you places while you marvel at the softness of his golden coat.
mount.description: Created by Venat, this dog-like familiar lends his back only to those who have won his favor─which you already had by the time you first met him in Mare Lamentorum owing to the quirks of time travel.
mount.tooltip:
Gosh, he's a fast doggy!
- Nashu Mhakaracca
